content.text: Based on the excerpts, two tickets describe the same issue.

structured_response.answer: Two tickets describe duplicate Stripe charges on the same account.

citations.snippet: Customer reports they were charged twice for plan Team.
Stripe dashboard shows two successful charges ch_abc and ch_def within a 5-minute window.
